tools.name: verify_scripture_quote
tools.description: Fact-check a claimed Bible quote against the actual text. Returns whether the quote is real, the exact canonical wording, the correct reference, and a confidence score. Use this before publishing any Bible quote to catch misquotes, wrong verse numbers, and verses that do not exist in the Bible at al

tools.name: resolve_reference
tools.description: Normalize any Bible reference into canonical form. Accepts abbreviations and loose formats ("Rom 8:28", "1 Cor 13", "Jn 3.16", "Psalm 23:1-4") and returns the canonical book name, chapter, verse range, OSIS id, and the verse text. Deterministic — no AI generation.

tools.name: get_verse_text
tools.description: Fetch the exact text of a Bible verse, passage, or whole chapter from a public-domain translation (kjv = King James Version). Deterministic — no AI generation.

tools.name: study_bible_passage
tools.description: Ask any question about any Bible verse or passage and get a clear, Scripture-cited answer. Optionally pick a study mode: summary (what the passage is about), observe (what the text says), interpret (what it means), theology (how it fits the whole of Scripture), apply (how to live it), apologetics (a

tools.name: find_verse_study_page
tools.description: Check whether a free in-depth study page ('What does this verse mean?') exists for a Bible verse on study.mybiblecopilot.com, and get its URL.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "study_bible_passage" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.
